option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Collect all core source files file(GLOB_RECURSE LOGEN_CORE_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/graphics/*.cpp" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/graphics/*.h" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/io/*.cpp" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/io/*.h" )
add_library(LogenCore SHARED ${LOGEN_CORE_SOURCES})
# Set the output name to "logen" (produces logen.dll on Windows) set_target_properties(LogenCore PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "logen" PREFIX "" # Removes the "lib" prefix on MinGW/Linux )
# Define export macro for DLL symbol visibility target_compile_definitions(LogenCore PRIVATE LOGEN_CORE_EXPORTS) target_compile_definitions(LogenCore PUBLIC LOGEN_CORE_DLL)
# Include directories - make core headers available target_include_directories(LogenCore PUBLIC "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.." # So consumers can use #include "core/..." PRIVATE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}" )
# Link dependencies target_link_libraries(LogenCore PUBLIC glm::glm PRIVATE glad glfw assimp )
# Copy assimp DLL to output directory add_custom_command(TARGET LogenCore POST_BUILD COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different "${ASSIMP_ROOT_DIR}/bin/Release/assimp-vc145-mt.dll" "${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/assimp-vc145-mt.dll" )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Collect all core source files file(GLOB_RECURSE LOGEN_CORE_SOURCES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.h" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/graphics/*.cpp" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/graphics/*.h" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/io/*.cpp" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/io/*.h" )
add_library(LogenCore SHARED ${LOGEN_CORE_SOURCES})
# Set the output name to "logen" (produces logen.dll on Windows) set_target_properties(LogenCore PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "logen" PREFIX "" # Removes the "lib" prefix on MinGW/Linux )
# Define export macro for DLL symbol visibility target_compile_definitions(LogenCore PRIVATE LOGEN_CORE_EXPORTS) target_compile_definitions(LogenCore PUBLIC LOGEN_CORE_DLL)
# Include directories - make core headers available target_include_directories(LogenCore PUBLIC "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.." # So consumers can use #include "core/..." PRIVATE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}" )
# Link dependencies target_link_libraries(LogenCore PUBLIC glm::glm PRIVATE glad glfw assimp )
# Copy assimp DLL to output directory add_custom_command(TARGET LogenCore POST_BUILD COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_if_different "${ASSIMP_ROOT_DIR}/bin/Release/assimp-vc145-mt.dll" "${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/assimp-vc145-mt.dll" )

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
